channel.title: Dependabot on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Dependabot on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Expanded OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning
item.description:
Dependabot and code scanning now support OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication for organization-level private registries on Cloudsmith and Google Artifact Registry.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Cross-org Dependabot access for internal repositories
item.description:
Dependabot can now access internal repositories in other organizations within the same enterprise. This lets Dependabot resolve dependencies hosted in cross-org internal GitHub repositories.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot-based dependency graphs for Python
item.description:
GitHub now uses Dependabot-based data to generate more complete and accurate transitive dependency trees for Python dependency graphs and SBOMs. This change improves coverage for Python projects.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: OIDC support for Dependabot and code scanning
item.description:
Dependabot and code scanning now support OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication for private registries configured at the organization level. This removes the need to store long-lived credentials as repository secrets.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot and code scanning: Org-level private registries
item.description:
GitHub now lets organizations configure multiple private registries at the org level for Dependabot and code scanning, which is useful for setups that use more than one internal package feed. Previously, org-level settings supported only one private registry per ecosystem.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot alerts are now assignable to AI agents for remediation
item.description:
Dependabot alerts can now be assigned to AI coding agents for remediation, including Copilot, Claude, and Codex. This is intended for vulnerabilities that require code changes beyond a simple dependency version update.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot version updates now support the Nix ecosystem
item.description:
Dependabot version updates now support the Nix ecosystem via Nix flakes. You can add nix as a package ecosystem in dependabot.yml and Dependabot will monitor flake.lock inputs and open pull requests when updates are available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot now supports Xcode projects using SwiftPM with .xcodeproj manifests
item.description:
Dependabot now supports Swift package dependencies in Xcode projects that use .xcodeproj bundles to manage packages, even when there is no Package.swift file. It can detect and update those dependencies directly from the Xcode project manifest.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot now detects malware in npm dependencies
item.description:
Dependabot can now alert on npm dependencies that match known malware advisories. When malware alerting is enabled, it checks repository npm dependencies against malicious package versions.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot alert assignees are now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Dependabot now supports assigning vulnerability alerts to specific users (generally available). This adds per-alert ownership to help teams track and remediate dependency vulnerabilities.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Dependabot can group updates by dependency name across multiple directories
item.description:
Dependabot can now group update PRs by dependency name across multiple directories in a repository.

  • Source: GitHub
